## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is tight — only files relevant to the change are touched.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-visible.
- [ ] Updated docs (`docs/docs/...`) if behaviour or config changed.
- [ ] Updated `.vibe-flow.example.yaml` if a new config field was added.
- [ ] No secrets / tokens / personal paths left in diffs.
